Campaign Page - B2C

Complete Kickstarter/Indiegogo campaign page copy for tech-savvy homeowners, energy-conscious consumers, and safety-focused families

HeyZack Campaign Page Copy (B2C)

Target Audience: Tech-Savvy Homeowners, Energy-Conscious Consumers, Safety-Focused Families
Platform: Kickstarter/Indiegogo
Voice: Friendly, Reassuring, Intelligent-but-not-Technical (The Knowledgeable Friend)

Above the Fold

Qualifier

Are you tired of juggling seven different smart home apps?

Headline

Your Home, Intelligently Automated.
One app controls everything. Learns your habits automatically. Saves 15-30% on energy bills. No monthly fees. Setup takes 30 minutes.

Subhead

HeyZack is the smart home that finally just works—genuine AI that adapts to your life, not another gadget you have to babysit.

Trust Anchors

✓ One App, Everything – Control 128+ products across cameras, locks, climate, lighting
✓ AI That Actually Learns – Pattern recognition, not just timers
✓ No Monthly Fees – Core features free forever
✓ Works With What You Own – WiFi, Zigbee, Bluetooth, Matter compatible
✓ DIY Setup – 30 minutes per device, no electrician needed
✓ Energy Savings Guaranteed – See dollar savings in real-time

Hero Image Spec

Visual: Split-screen lifestyle shot

  • LEFT: Homeowner juggling phone showing 7 different smart home apps (Ring, Nest, Philips Hue, SmartThings logos visible), frustrated expression, cluttered notification badges
  • RIGHT: Same homeowner relaxed on couch, single HeyZack app showing unified dashboard, coffee in hand, warm home lighting in background
  • Overlay Text: “From This → To This”

Primary CTA

Back This Project – Early Bird: Save 40% | Ships February 2026

Old World: The Problem

Bleeding Neck Narrative

You’re not crazy. Smart homes have been a mess.

You bought a smart thermostat because they promised energy savings. So you got a Nest. Then you needed security cameras, so you got Ring. Your lights? Philips Hue has those smart bulbs everyone raves about. Door lock? August. Sensors? Maybe SmartThings.

And now you have seven different apps on your phone. Seven different accounts. Seven different notification systems. Seven different “automations” that mysteriously stop working after firmware updates.

Your partner asks, “Can you just turn on the living room lights?” and you have to remember which app controls those particular lights.

This isn’t the future you signed up for.

You’ve spent $1,400+ on smart devices that were supposed to make life easier. But honestly? Sometimes you miss regular light switches.

Failed Alternatives

HomeKit (Apple’s Approach)

What they promised: Privacy-first, elegant integration
What you got: Tiny device selection, $180 premium-priced bulbs, Siri automations that are just glorified timers

SmartThings (Samsung’s “Universal” Hub)

What they promised: One hub controls everything
What you got: Buggy mess that breaks every firmware update. You’ve rebuilt automations three times in two years.

Google Home / Nest

What they promised: Best voice assistant, learns your habits
What you got: Corporate strategy chaos. They’ve migrated the setup three times.

DIY Home Assistant (Open Source)

What they promised: Maximum flexibility
What you got: A part-time job. YAML configuration at 11 PM.

The False Trade-Off

The industry tells you to pick two:

  • • Device Compatibility • Intelligence ✗ Simplicity
  • • Privacy • Simplicity ✗ Device Compatibility
  • • Simplicity • Intelligence ✗ No Vendor Lock-In

That’s a lie. You shouldn’t have to choose.

New World: The Solution

The Mechanism

What if your home actually learned instead of just obeyed?

HeyZack uses genuine AI pattern recognition (not rule-based scheduling) to understand how you actually live.

How It’s Different:

Old Smart Homes (Rule-Based):

IF time = 6:00 PM  
THEN turn on living room lights

Problem: Doesn’t know if you’re home, on vacation, or coming home late.

HeyZack (AI Learning):

LEARNS: Tyler arrives home between 5:45-6:15 PM on weekdays  
OBSERVES: Geofencing shows Tyler 15 minutes away  
ADAPTS: Pre-cool house to 70°F, turn on entry lights  
EXCEPTION: On Friday nights, delays by 30 minutes (learned pattern)

Result: Your home anticipates needs before you realize you have them.

Feature Highlights

1. Unified Control Ecosystem

Feature: Single iOS/Android app controls all 128 HeyZack product types + 1000+ third-party devices
Benefit: No more app-juggling hell. Check entire home status in one glance.
Emotion: Relief. “I can finally see everything without opening seven apps.”

2. Genuine AI Learning

Feature: Behavioral pattern recognition that improves over 3-6 months
Benefit: Automations adapt to your actual life (not rigid schedules you program)
Emotion: Delight. “It figured out our Friday nights are different—I never told it that.”

3. Energy Visibility + Optimization

Feature: Real-time monitoring per room/device + automated optimization
Benefit: See exactly where money goes, save 15-30% ($360-$720/year) without behavior change
Emotion: Empowerment. “I finally know why my bill spiked—basement fridge was dying.”

4. Zero Monthly Fees

Feature: No subscription required for core automation (optional cloud storage only)
Benefit: One-time purchase. Core features work forever.
Emotion: Freedom. “No more $10/month x 7 services = $840/year saved.”

5. Universal Compatibility

Feature: WiFi, Zigbee 3.0, Bluetooth, Matter, IR support
Benefit: Works with virtually any smart device brand (Nest, Ring, Philips Hue, Ecobee, etc.)
Emotion: Validation. “I don’t have to replace everything I already own.”

6. Intelligent Security

Feature: AI learns normal activity, alerts only on genuine anomalies
Benefit: No more 40 alerts/day. No 2 AM false alarms. Real threats only.
Emotion: Peace of Mind. “I can trust the alerts again—it knows my cat is normal.”

7. DIY Installation

Feature: QR code pairing, no wiring or electrician required
Benefit: Setup in 30 minutes per device. Save $3,000+ installation fees.
Emotion: Confidence. “If I can use a smartphone, I can set up HeyZack.”

8. Local + Cloud Hybrid

Feature: Edge computing on control panels, optional cloud features
Benefit: Works during internet outages. Your data stays yours.
Emotion: Trust. “Even if WiFi dies, my automations still run.”

AI Learning Engine

Phase 1 (Week 1-2): Observation

  • System monitors patterns: when you wake, leave, return, sleep
  • Tracks climate preferences, lighting usage, security arming behavior
  • No automation yet—just learning

Phase 2 (Week 3-6): Suggestion

  • HeyZack proposes automations based on observed patterns
  • “I noticed you always turn on kitchen lights at 6:45 AM—automate this?”
  • You approve or modify suggestions

Phase 3 (Month 2+): Autonomous Optimization

  • System refines automations based on exceptions
  • Learns seasonal differences, weekend vs. weekday behavior
  • Continuously improves without manual intervention

Example: Energy savings typically increase from 15% (Month 1) → 22% (Month 3) → 28% (Month 6) as AI optimizes.

Product Ecosystem

CategoryProductsExample Use Cases
Video Doorbells4 models2K video, solar-powered options, two-way audio, package detection
Security Cameras5 modelsIndoor/outdoor, night vision, person/vehicle detection, local storage
Smart Sensors13 typesMotion, door/window, temperature, humidity, water leak, gas, smoke
Control Panels6 sizes3.5”-10.1” displays with built-in Alexa, Zigbee gateway, energy dashboard
Smart Switches5 types1-4 gang display switches, WiFi/Zigbee, power monitoring, 600W load
Door Locks10 modelsFace recognition, fingerprint, video doorbell integration, keypad
Climate Control14 devicesSmart thermostats, radiator valves, floor heating, VRF controllers
Lighting18 productsLED drivers, dimmers, RGB controllers, strip drivers
Curtain Systems29 productsTubular motors, track systems, smart controllers, schedules
Gateways4 modelsZigbee, WiFi, Matter protocol hubs

Total: 128+ products across 15 categories

Connectivity & Compatibility

Protocols Supported:

  • WiFi: 2.4GHz (some dual-band 2.4G + 5GHz)
  • Zigbee 3.0: Mesh networking for reliability
  • Bluetooth: BLE and BLE Mesh
  • Matter: Future-proof standard support
  • IR: 38KHz universal remote control

Works With:

  • Amazon Alexa & Echo devices
  • Google Home & Google Assistant
  • Apple HomeKit (via Matter gateway)
  • Tuya Smart / Smart Life ecosystem
  • Samsung SmartThings (integration)
  • IFTTT for advanced workflows

Device Compatibility: 1000+ third-party devices from 200+ brands

Privacy & Security

Local Control First:

  • Core automations run on edge devices (no cloud required)
  • Camera footage stored locally (SD card up to 256GB)
  • Automations work during internet outages

Security Standards:

  • Bank-level AES-256 encryption
  • Two-factor authentication
  • Regular security audits
  • No third-party data sharing

Your Data Philosophy: We sell hardware, not your data. You own your information.

Starter Kits (Launch Exclusive)

Security Essentials Kit – $299 (40% off MSRP $499)

  • 1x Video Doorbell (2K)
  • 2x Window/Door Sensors
  • 1x Motion Sensor
  • 1x Smart Gateway Hub
  • Save: $200 vs. buying separately

Energy Saver Kit – $349 (40% off MSRP $582)

  • 1x Smart Thermostat (WiFi)
  • 3x Smart Switches (1-gang, power monitoring)
  • 1x Control Panel (7” display)
  • 1x Smart Gateway Hub
  • Save: $233 vs. buying separately

Whole Home Intelligence Kit – $799 (40% off MSRP $1,332)

  • 1x Video Doorbell (2K, Solar)
  • 1x Outdoor Camera (2K, Night Vision)
  • 1x Indoor Camera (1080p, Pan/Tilt)
  • 1x Smart Thermostat
  • 4x Smart Switches (1-gang)
  • 1x Smart Door Lock (Fingerprint + Keypad)
  • 6x Window/Door Sensors
  • 2x Motion Sensors
  • 1x Control Panel (7” display)
  • 1x Smart Gateway Hub
  • Save: $533 vs. buying separately

Timeline

  • February 15, 2026: Kickstarter campaign launch
  • March 30, 2026: Campaign close, production begins
  • June 2026: First shipments to backers
  • Q4 2026: Retail availability

Guarantee

  • 30-day money-back guarantee
  • 2-year warranty on all devices
  • Lifetime firmware updates
